commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Matrix MessagePresentation metadata support/docs/tests and adds a root `matrix-js-sdk` dependency plus a release-check regression for packaged Matrix SDK imports.

Reproducibility: no. live packed-install reproduction was run. The PR defects are source-reproducible from the diff, current `extensions/matrix/package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, and the current release verifier, but the original installed CLI failure still needs package acceptance proof.
commands.review_followup: Draft/unmergeable PR needs maintainer direction to split the Matrix presentation feature from the runtime-dependency fix and align the dependency strategy with current packaging policy before automation should repair it.
